title: Myrtille - move it to the Azure WebApp
author: MariuszFerdyn
body:
Is it possible to move it to the Azure App Service and from there it will be the main webpage to connect to other RDP Servers?
I will try to do it, but maybe you will tell me that it is impossible...

title: Host Configuration - Can I desplay all hosts in main page?
author: MariuszFerdyn
body: I see in host configuration we can add several hosts, but these host are displayed on the home page - how to display them?

title: Windows 11 - I would like to start a program when user connect?
author: MariuszFerdyn
body:
Windows 11 - I would like to start a program when user connect?
Simply similar to publish App in RDP server? Is it possible? URL encoding is not the best option.

title: Transfer this repository into another place (organization)
author: Neustradamus
body:
Dear @cedrozor,

Can you move this "myrtille" repository into a GitHub Free organization to have a new development, a better project management, etc.?

Important to know, there is no lost, and GitHub adds redirections after a transfer, for example:
- https://github.com/nerzhul/ocsms -> https://github.com/nextcloud/ocsms
- https://github.com/tigaseinc/tigase-server -> https://github.com/tigase/tigase-server
- https://github.com/boothj5/profanity -> https://github.com/profanity-im/profanity
- https://github.com/asciimoo/searx -> https://github.com/searx/searx

Thanks in advance.

---------

Create an organization:
- https://help.github.com/en/github/setting-up-and-managing-organizations-and-teams/creating-a-new-organization-from-scratch

Transfer a repository:
- https://help.github.com/en/github/administering-a-repository/transferring-a-repository

title: Is this project alive?
author: Neustradamus
body:
Dear @cedrozor,

It is possible to have changes in this project?

The website is always here:
- https://www.myrtille.io/

Thanks in advance.

title: Error in console/no display
author: Bluscrn99
body:
I've been trying to figure out how to use this software, and on connecting to my host i get a blank screen, and info says 0 img/s. I also noticed the dev mode console gives the following error:
contentScript.js:1 Uncaught (in promise) TypeError: Failed to execute 'observe' on 'MutationObserver': parameter 1 is not of type 'Node'.
    at b (contentScript.js:1:1790)
    at contentScript.js:6:494
I don't know if these are related, but I would really like help with my display issues.

title: New tab/window causing issues (ctrl t/n)
author: KayakKayla
body:
Hi,
Other commands like ctrl x/c/v/a/f/p/s have been working smoothly inside Myrtille for me. However, when I type in ctrl t/n to open a new tab/window, it will open it on the client computer instead of the remote host. Then, when going back to the Myrtille session, the ctrl key will be "held," so typing normally could open unwanted shortcuts. When the ctrl key is pressed again, then Myrtille goes back to normal. I am using Myrtille 2.9.2, along with Chrome and Edge. Has anyone else encountered a similar issue? Thanks in advance

title: Windows screen colors are missing
author: AffinityUser
body:
When we run Myrtille on Windows Server 2019, the screen colors are missing. Might anyone have a recommendation for how to resolve this issue. This does not occur when we run Myrtille on Windows Server 2012. Thanks in advance.

![Screens hard to read without dialog color](https://github.com/cedrozor/myrtille/assets/170148408/83fb63c5-9902-497c-b830-53a4e1c98d73)

title: Alphanumeric keys do not work if using VBox VRDP
author: MVoloshin
body: Hello, I connect to my Windows 8 guest (VirtualBox VRDP) via Myrtille. I noticed that I cannot type anything from keyboard actually (except some keys like Backspace, Enter, arrows, etc). Both physical and on-screen keyboard do not work. Layout is en-US (both on Win10 host and Win8 guest). Do you know any workaround?

author: troggie

Good day all

the Myrtille.Services [Myrtille HTTP(S) to RDP and SSH gateway] - [C:\Program Files (x86)\Myrtille\bin\Myrtille.Services.exe] fails to start

title: Manually add Myrtille without msi install
author: mkanet
body:
I much more prefer to add/install my ASP.NET apps manually (manually copying runtime files to a folder and converting the folder into an ASP.NET application on IIS).  

Is it possible for me to get the latest Myrtille version in a ZIP file and install it manually?  Please? :)  If so, I am guessing I will need to specify settings like admin port and services port in a config text file?  Hopefully, it is still simple to do.

Anyway, thank you so much for all your hard work in maintaining this great application!

title: Auto-Connect URL
author: ASoungie
body:
I'm having trouble auto-starting an RDP using the auto-connect URL (https://myserver/Myrtille/?__EVENTTARGET=&__EVENTARGUMENT=&server=server&domain=domain%5Boptional%5D&user=user&passwordHash=passwordHash&program=program%5Boptional%5D&width=width(px)%5Boptional%5D&height=height(px)%5Boptional%5D&connect=Connect%21)

I currently get "Invalid credentials" when I try this method.

I'm running Myrtille in enterprise mode and I have 2 RDP hosts set up with a specific domain group for both. I'm debugging it in Visual Studio 2022 and the code never reaches line 460 and on-wards in Default.aspx under Myrtille.Web. I'm also generating the hashed password from the /GetHash.aspx page.

I'm assuming it's because the enterprise session is still null.

I'm using version 2.9.2

title: only one enhanced session at a time?
author: quantum900
body:
Does myrtille only allow one enhanced session at a time? If I already have an enhanced session running and I try to connect another from a different workstation (to a different server) the console does not display until I disconnect the first session. Standard sessions I can run multiple.

Just looking for clarification.

title: Installer fails to execute PowerShell script during installation
author: Rainmaker52
body:
Host is Windows 11. This issue seems similar to https://github.com/cedrozor/myrtille/issues/326. However, as no solution was provided, 

Error in the installer:
![image](https://github.com/cedrozor/myrtille/assets/537352/62e793d2-5071-4967-a82c-3e500e75157e)
After this, the installer gives an error saying the "InstallState" file cannot be found, and rolls back all the changes.

Logfile indicates the following error:
The term 'New-WebAppPool' is not recognized as the name of a cmdlet, function, script file, or operable program. Check the spelling of the name, or if a path was included, verify that the path is correct and try again.

The solution is to install this optional Windows component:
![image](https://github.com/cedrozor/myrtille/assets/537352/a96ca747-74f2-462e-a88d-a0ab0ddb20b3)
It would be good if the script can check for this situation, and solves this automatically.

title: Printing with myrtille pdf slow
author: virgilioribeiro
body:
First of all, I would like to say that this "Myrtille" project is fantastic.

I have a strange problem with printing on one of the servers.

I'm using version 2.9.2,
The servers are running the Windows Server 2019 operating system.

The first is an old celeron that works well and prints in 2 seconds with "Myrtille PDF".

The Second is a more recent I5 that takes 10 seconds to print with "Myrtille PDF".

Both have the same settings (myrtille, iis, windows, ...)
Could you possibly help me?

Thanks in advance for any help.

title: File Transfer - Failed to retrieve files in TEMP\Documents
author: Hesketh
body:
So we have Myrtille setup on our machine and to the best of our knowledge it should be configured correctly for file transfer but it fails with exceptions that are happening in Myrtille.Services.log when we try and upload a file (also no files are listed for download).

```
2023-11-16 11:25:30,552 [46] ERROR System.Diagnostics redirection [(null)] - Failed to retrieve file(s) from user MYRTILLE001 documents folder C:\Users\TEMP\Documents, remote session 45ff33de-4a60-42c5-83dd-8bd9496a609c (System.IO.DirectoryNotFoundException: Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Users\TEMP\Documents'.
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1.CommonInit()
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1..ctor(String path, String originalUserPath, String searchPattern, SearchOption searchOption, SearchResultHandler`1 resultHandler, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.Directory.GetFiles(String path)
   at Myrtille.Services.FileStorage.GetUserDocumentsFolderFiles(Guid remoteSessionId, String userDomain, String userName, String userPassword))
2023-11-16 11:25:36,162 [46] ERROR System.Diagnostics redirection [(null)] - Failed to retrieve file(s) from user MYRTILLE001 documents folder C:\Users\TEMP\Documents, remote session 45ff33de-4a60-42c5-83dd-8bd9496a609c (System.IO.DirectoryNotFoundException: Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Users\TEMP\Documents'.
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1.CommonInit()
   at System.IO.FileSystemEnumerableIterator`1..ctor(String path, String originalUserPath, String searchPattern, SearchOption searchOption, SearchResultHandler`1 resultHandler, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.Directory.GetFiles(String path)
   at Myrtille.Services.FileStorage.GetUserDocumentsFolderFiles(Guid remoteSessionId, String userDomain, String userName, String userPassword))
2023-11-16 11:25:38,399 [46] ERROR System.Diagnostics redirection [(null)] - Failed to upload file asda.csv to user MYRTILLE001 documents folder C:\Users\TEMP\Documents, remote session 45ff33de-4a60-42c5-83dd-8bd9496a609c (System.IO.DirectoryNotFoundException: Could not find a part of the path 'C:\Users\TEMP\Documents\asda.csv'.
   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileStream.Init(String path, FileMode mode, FileAccess access, Int32 rights, Boolean useRights, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize, FileOptions options, SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES secAttrs, String msgPath, Boolean bFromProxy, Boolean useLongPath, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.FileStream..ctor(String path, FileMode mode, FileAccess access, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize)
   at Myrtille.Services.FileStorage.UploadFileToUserDocumentsFolder(UploadRequest uploadRequest))
```

The User we are using for the remote session is MYRTILLE001.
And I am uploading a document called asda.csv from my local machine desktop.

We have done the redirect of the documents for this user to a network share. 
And if I remote in using Window's Remote Desktop the folder is redirected and files stored there can be read/written/deleted/etc.
However if I remote in (and launch an app) using Myrtille the folder is empty. Strangely If I write a file into the documents it will write into the network share, but the active Myrtille user wont see it while connected through Myrtille.

Now we are thinking its likely because its trying to look in 'C:\Users\TEMP\Documents\' instead of the actual Documents for the user.

I appreciate any info you could provide, I respect this could just be a configuration issue but we are at a loss for what we are doing differently.

title: Update SSH client to support EC 25519
author: peepsmn
body: The Myrtile.SSH client is built using SSH.Net 2016.1.0, which did not support Curve25519, which is all the rage these days, especially on RHEL 8/RHEL9 environments.  SSH.Net 2020.2.0 does support it and can easily be added in without adverse effects.  I couldn't get a build of everything that I was able to push back to the repo, but recompiling Myrtille.Ssh -> packages.config for SSH.NET to version 2020.0.2 and compiling, then moving over Myrtille.SSH.exe, Myrtille.SSH.exe.config, and Renci.SshNet.dll, I was able to connect to my RHEL 9 instances where before I was not able to, and the Curve25519 has been a consistent issue with older SSH clients and these new images for my users.  I know the current release is a couple of years old, but for the next release, this needs to be updated as newer 'nix OSes are switching to this for heightened security

title: wfreerdp.exe and w3pw.exe are causing high CPU utilization
author: BarryLiu04
body: wfreerdp.exe and w3pw.exe randomly cause high server CPU usage (over 95%).  Normally, the cpu utilization is around 5%-15%. Does anyone know the underlying cause?
